programme.desc: Wu is one of Singapore’s common surnames. Jojo Wu (Goh) who knows little about her ancestral root, travels to Peitian Village in Fujian, where generations of Wu live. She meets an elderly who spent four years to hand-copy the clan genealogy, a young man who promotes traditional farming and livelihood and women who play Shifan music and samples local specialties. Is this journey the answer to her yearning to belong?

programme.desc: Film developing and traditional photo studios are fading, yet some still hold on. programme.title: Eat Better, Live Better - EP 8
programme.desc: Traditional slow-cooked soups are seen as nourishing, but with high fat and purine ingredients, daily consumption may raise risks of gout or stroke. programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 46
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: The Passbook - EP 14
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Bi De has to pretend to be Bi An for the time being. To prepare Bi De for the overseas scholarship selection test, Bi An's grandfather painstakingly teaches him how to do accounts and how to behave like Bi An. Bi De finds everything difficult but he perseveres.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 17
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Taizhu informs her family of her relationship with Xiangjun, but Sulin claims she has just broken up with Nanxiu and insists that Taizhu must neither date nor marry until Sulin finds a more ideal partner.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 18
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Taizhu dresses elegantly to attend Xiangmin and her fiance's family gathering. Upon seeing her, Xiangmin flies into a rage, grabs a bucket of water, and drenches Taizhu completely.

programme.title: The Borderless World - EP 6
programme.desc: The news team travels to different continents, interviewing hundreds of countries and cities, providing viewers with materials to understand the world and different perspectives.

programme.title: Tale of the Nine-tailed - EP 2
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhiya confronts Li Yan, revealing she knows he is not human. Yan's malicious younger brother, Li Lang begins targeting Zhiya

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 85
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: The Borderless World - EP 6
programme.desc: The news team travels to different continents, interviewing hundreds of countries and cities, providing viewers with materials to understand the world and different perspectives.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 24
programme.desc: Shao Yichen unexpectedly reconnects with an old acquaintance who encourages him to stop dwelling on the past. Watching Ji Xing gradually move closer to Han Ting, he finally begins letting go of feelings he has carried for years and starts embracing a different future.

programme.title: Viva La Romance Season 6 - EP 8
programme.desc: A reality show that delves into couples' conversations, centered on love and understanding. Four couples travel and glean insights from other couples' dynamics, fostering self-reflection, empathy, and marital rejuvenation.

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 11
programme.desc: As Hoi Ching-lam edges closer to the truth, he uncovers unexpected links between his brother's past and Shek Ngo-shan's career. While suspicion deepens, Yip Ying-fung warns him that not every answer will bring closure.

programme.desc: Join James, the host with outstanding culinary skills and an appetite for good food, as he explores markets and savours local delicacies in Taiwan!

programme.desc: Shek Ngo-shan is forced to revisit painful memories when someone from his past unexpectedly returns. His composed exterior begins to crack, revealing the burden he has quietly carried for years.

programme.title: Time Concert 2024 - EP 3
programme.desc: After 20 years, the Girls are back on stage! "Time Concert 2024" revives nostalgic melodies, celebrating two decades of music with a dazzling showcase and a competition for the top hits of the era!

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 13
programme.desc: Ching-lam's relentless pursuit of answers strains his relationships with those closest to him. As Kong Ka-ching worries he is losing himself to obsession, Ying-fung encourages him to focus on the future rather than the past.

programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 5
programme.desc: To enter An without attracting attention, Ning Yuanzhou has everyone assume new identities and divide their responsibilities. But a series of unexpected incidents threatens to expose the operation and reveals the presence of another mysterious force working behind the scenes.

programme.title: Ride The Wind 2026 - EP 3
programme.desc: On the wings of the wind, the sisters soar, chasing dreams with courage, growing with every step on stage. In Ride the Wind 2026, women from all walks of life unite, breaking boundaries through performance after performance, blooming into their most radiant selves.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 26
programme.desc: Li Li finally makes peace with a long-standing regret and discovers that happiness does not always come from following the path others expect. Inspired by her courage, Ji Xing begins reflecting on whether she should be equally honest about her own feelings.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 5
programme.desc: To enter An without attracting attention, Ning Yuanzhou has everyone assume new identities and divide their responsibilities. But a series of unexpected incidents threatens to expose the operation and reveals the presence of another mysterious force working behind the scenes.

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA - EP 27
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 29
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine — from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: Cinta Abang Tamvan Pantang Disayurin
programme.desc: Nando (Morgan Oey) helps Sesil (Rayna Snova), who is about to be sold abroad. Nando asks his mother for permission to let Sesil stay at her house.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6 - EP 29
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Ilmu Padi Mbakku Makin Berisi Makin Jadian
programme.desc: Juli (Nabila Zavira) and Romi (Naufal Samudra) fight over a motorbike taxi to get to the office, where they both work. Juli works as a security guard, while Romi works as a cleaning service. However, the more they see each other, the more they bicker.

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA - EP 28
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: Pol PP Cantik Galaknya Bikin Candu
programme.desc: Dimas (Kenny Austin) is caught in a raid by Intan (Yuriska Patricia), who thinks he's a busker. It turns out Dimas isn't just any busker, but the future son-in-law of Burhan, Intan's commander.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 29
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine — from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: THE SULTAN ENTERTAINMENT - EP 6
programme.desc: The Sultan is a talk show featuring two sultan-like hosts: Sultan Andara and Raffi Ahmad and Sultan Bintaro and Andre Taulany, accompanied by a cast of beautiful and handsome employees. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed. Find out more at The Sultan Entertainment.

programme.title: HIKMAH - EP 20
programme.desc: A reality show that encapsulates everyday life stories, personal trials, and spiritual journeys. The program is rich in moral values, showcasing individuals as they navigate complex life dilemmas until they ultimately uncover the silver lining and wisdom behind every trial they endure

programme.title: Jasa Boleh Disewa, Kalo Hati Jangan
programme.desc: Cahaya's (Larasati Nugroho) life goal is to make her sister happy. One day, Laras meets Adit (Rizki Alatas). They're both in a hurry, and their paper bags get swapped. Rizki's paper bag is for his fiancée, a beautiful ring. Laras's paper bag contains a simple bracelet.

programme.title: Dari Sini Kita Belajar Untuk Jatuh Cinta
programme.desc: Julian (Arya Vasco) is determined to find the whereabouts of Vino's mother and sibling, his close friend. It turns out that Julian is reunited with Gea (Saskia Chadwick), the person whose bag he once stole, who turns out to be Vino's younger sibling, separated for more than a decade. In order to deliver Vino's last message, Julian disguises himself as Vino and enters the life of Gea and her family.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 30
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine — from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6 - EP 30
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Neng Pete Bau Cintanya Warbiyasah
programme.desc: Dania (Shanice Margaretha) sells petai chili sauce on campus. One day, she accidentally meets Kenny (Aliando Syarief), a rich kid. Kenny's father holds an important position on campus. However, Dania is upset by Kenny's actions, which resulted in him bumping into her and scattering his wares. Kenny doesn't accept this, and they get into an argument.

programme.title: Ketika Ada Yang Menyalakan Cintamu, Kamu Nanyea?
programme.desc: Eneng had to pretend to be crazy to date Dilan. Dilan is Abah Arga's grandson. Abah Arga set a condition for Dilan: he must marry a village girl in exchange for capital.

programme.title: Ngga Usah Ngadi Ngadi Nanti Kamu Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Derry broke up with Vina after they had a fight and misunderstanding. Derry, who was now closer to Elsa, helped Elsa sell roasted corn. Derry's father, who found out about this, was angry with Derry and forbade him from approaching Elsa again. He preferred if Derry was with Vina. According to Derry's father, the hotel's image would be damaged if Derry remained with Elsa and helped Elsa sell roasted corn.

programme.title: Ada Kalanya Cinta Melipir Dari Hati Duluan
programme.desc: Wulan (Jennifer Eve) helps a pickpocket escape from a mob, and strangely enough, Wulan even tricks the pickpocket several times by returning the stolen wallets to their owners. But suddenly Wulan decides to cosplay as Ninin, a beautiful girl who works in a widower's house. Strangely, there Ninin claims to be the widower's fiancée. With determination, Ninin persists, despite facing criticism from some people who have been close to the widower (Ridho Illahi).

programme.title: AGAK LAIN MAS SUSU MURNI
programme.desc: Mail travels all the way to Jakarta on a desperate mission to locate his missing older brother. While the city feels vast and overwhelming, destiny works in mysterious ways when he unexpectedly crosses paths with Imah—his true soulmate—right at his new workplace.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 7
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Momen Paling Gemesin Ayam Bahagia
programme.desc: Nindy (Ina Marika) relocates to a quiet village for her medical internship, only to run straight into her past love, Juna (Kevin Hillers). As Nindy uses her medical expertise to care for Juna’s ailing younger sibling, she quickly wins over his entire family. Surrounded by old memories and new gratitude, Juna finds himself falling head over heels for Nindy all over again.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 33
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Rumah Angker Kok Malah Bikin Baper
programme.desc: Fleeing from home to escape an arranged marriage, Celin (Shanice Margaretha) hits the road with her friend. A fierce shouting match erupts when the truck driver, Dimas (Aditya Zoni), blames Celin for the gridlock. Through a twist of fate, Guntur lands a position as Yura's personal chauffeur. However, their very first ride turns into an absolute disaster, leaving a furious Yura convinced that her new driver is bound to ruin her career.

programme.title: AKU GANTI CITA - CITA BANGUN JEMBATAN KE HATIMU
programme.desc: Citra (Soraya Rasyid) unleashes her fury on Surya (Andrew Andika), blaming him for a collapsed village bridge that has been left neglected. To make matters worse, the broken infrastructure caused Citra to miss a crucial job interview in the city, sparking a bitter feud between the two

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 8
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Bodyguard Receh Cintanya Gak Weleh Weleh
programme.desc: Marsya (Indah Nicole), a wealthy and brilliant heiress, plots a fake kidnapping of herself with a friend to extort a massive ransom from her own mother. The scheme takes a dramatic turn when a brave stranger named Yuda (Indra Brotolaras) steps in and 'rescues' her. When Marsya’s mother uncovers the truth about the staged abduction, she hires Yuda as Marsya’s full-time bodyguard to keep her in line. Undeterred, the rebellious heiress immediately tries to lobby Yuda into joining her next fake kidn

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 34
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 180
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: AGAK LAIN MAS SUSU MURNI
programme.desc: Mail travels all the way to Jakarta on a desperate mission to locate his missing older brother. While the city feels vast and overwhelming, destiny works in mysterious ways when he unexpectedly crosses paths with Imah—his true soulmate—right at his new workplace.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 8
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. programme.title: Momen Paling Gemesin Ayam Bahagia
programme.desc: Nindy (Ina Marika) relocates to a quiet village for her medical internship, only to run straight into her past love, Juna (Kevin Hillers). As Nindy uses her medical expertise to care for Juna’s ailing younger sibling, she quickly wins over his entire family. Surrounded by old memories and new gratitude, Juna finds himself falling head over heels for Nindy all over again.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 34

programme.title: Rumah Angker Kok Malah Bikin Baper
programme.desc: Fleeing from home to escape an arranged marriage, Celin (Shanice Margaretha) hits the road with her friend. Their journey turns chaotic when they get stuck on a narrow, single-lane road facing a vegetable pickup truck. A fierce shouting match erupts when the truck driver, Dimas (Aditya Zoni), blames Celin for the gridlock. Seeking a place to lay low, Celin and her friend eventually seek shelter in a luxurious, abandoned mansion deep in the forest—unaware of the rumors that the house is deeply ha

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 181
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: AKU TERPISANG PISANG PADA PANDANGAN PERTAMA
programme.desc: Thomas (Lucky Perdana) nearly gets into a terrible accident due to Nadya’s (Shanice Margaretha) reckless driving as she speeds down the road in a banana cargo truck. To his absolute horror, Thomas later discovers that Nadya is the primary banana supplier for his mother’s bakery business. Furious about the roadside encounter, Thomas demands his mother cut all professional ties with the dangerous driver

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 9

programme.title: Kejar Cintamu Pake Cara Paling Badabest
programme.desc: Rayes (Masaji Wijayanto) loves nothing more than pulling ruthless pranks on freshmen during orientation week, and the feisty Savira (Sitha Marino) becomes his ultimate target. Just as Savira reaches her breaking point with his antics, a shocking rumor surfaces that their families have arranged their marriage. However, the stark contrast in their social status stands as a massive wall between them.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 21

programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Isteri VS. Tunang - EP 13
programme.desc: Alana Sofea, seorang gadis yang berterus terang, mencabar ego Zaim Azfar, seorang lelaki yang sombong dan angkuh, lalu membawa mereka ke dalam perkahwinan yang tidak dijangka.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 11
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang ibu tunggal, Mak Jah dan kisah kehidupannya bersama lapan orang anaknya yang sudah dewasa.

programme.title: Cik Serba Tahu - EP 4
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 16
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 23
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 19
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Frust Gila - EP 4
programme.desc: Frust Gila rancangan permainan penuh cabaran untuk 3 peserta, cabaran di sediakan untuk mendapatkan hanya satu pemenang.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 16
programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 2
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Opera Zero - EP 12
programme.desc: Rancangan yang memaparkan Zero sebagai sebuah kumpulan lawak di atas satu pentas.

programme.title: The Berlian Job
programme.desc: Kisah 2 sahabat yang membuka kedai kopi dan sebenarnya mereka adalah penyiasat persendirian. Mereka mendapat tugasan dari seorang anak Datuk untuk mencuri berlian kepunyaan ayahnya.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 12
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang ibu tunggal, Mak Jah dan kisah kehidupannya bersama lapan orang anaknya yang sudah dewasa.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 23

programme.title: Komedi Unplugged - EP 9

programme.title: Life At Thinker - EP 7
programme.desc: Life At Thinker adalah sebuah program vlog atau diari yang memaparkan aktiviti-aktiviti menarik dan kegilaan krew-krew Thinker Studios di sepanjang minggu.

programme.title: The Cadets - EP 4
programme.desc: Mengisahkan perjuangan empat sekawan - Amir, Farah, Hakim dan Liz - untuk membuktikan bahawa pasukan mereka mampu mengatasi segala cabaran untuk mewakili Kadet bomba di Kem Jamboree Kebangsaan.

programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: Sehar
programme.desc: Ajay Kumar, SSP of Lucknow police, cracks down on the cop-mafia nexus in UP, but finds a cunning and ruthless adversary in Gajraj. Release Year: 2005 Director: Kabeer Kaushik

programme.title: Race
programme.desc: A tale of greed, betrayal and revenge as two brothers are pitted against each other! High stakes! Perfect murder! Release Year: 2008 Director: Abbas Burmawalla,Mustan Burmawalla

programme.title: Coolie (1983)
programme.desc: An honest worker rises against injustice when powerful enemies exploit the poor. With courage and determination, he leads a fiery fight for dignity, justice and survival. Release Year: 1983 Director: Manmohan Desai, Prayag Raj

programme.title: Vanvaas
programme.desc: It explores familial relationships, sacrifice, emotional bonds, and the challenges of maintaining unity, as characters confront conflicts and rediscover the importance of family values in modern life. Release Year: 2024 Director: Anil Sharma Awards: 2025 WinnerTechnical Award- Best Story- Amjad Ali, Sunil Sirvaiya, Anil Sharma

programme.title: Parmanu - The Story Of Pokhran
programme.desc: A look at India's second confidential nuclear test series at Pokhran led by Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam, during the time of PM Atal Bihari Vajpayee's tenure.

programme.title: Indian
programme.desc: A policeman, Raj, nabs a terrorist, Wasim Khan, and is praised by his father-in-law, another high-ranking officer. However, when his father-in-law is mysteriously killed, Raj is blamed for the murder. Release Year: 2001 Director: N. Maharajan

programme.title: Mr. X
programme.desc: After gaining the power of invisibility; a man becomes a vigilante, in order to take revenge on those who have wronged him. Release Year: 2015 Director: Vikram Bhatt

programme.title: Lost
programme.desc: The tale of crime reporter Vidhi, who is out to find a missing college student. Her quest reveals the many layers of society that redefine politics, love, and betrayal. Release Year: 2022 Director: Aniruddha Roy Chowdhury

programme.title: Salaam Venky
programme.desc: Venky suffers from a rare type of muscular dystrophy and wants to donate his organs. With his mother's support, he petitions for legalising euthanasia. Will his wish be granted in the court of law? Release Year: 2022 Director: Revathi

programme.title: Ghoomer
programme.desc: Anina, a rising batting star, loses her right hand in a freak accident just before her international debut. Paddy, an alcoholic ex-cricketer, turns her fate around by training her to become a bowler.

programme.title: Indian
programme.desc: A policeman, Raj, nabs a terrorist, Wasim Khan, and is praised by his father-in-law, another high-ranking officer. However, when his father-in-law is mysteriously killed, Raj is blamed for the murder. Release Year: 2001 Director: N. Maharajan

programme.title: Mr. X
programme.desc: After gaining the power of invisibility; a man becomes a vigilante, in order to take revenge on those who have wronged him. Release Year: 2015 Director: Vikram Bhatt

programme.desc: The tale of crime reporter Vidhi, who is out to find a missing college student. Her quest reveals the many layers of society that redefine politics, love, and betrayal. Release Year: 2022 Director: Aniruddha Roy Chowdhury

programme.title: Taish
programme.desc: A story of friendship and loss of innocence when two worlds clash amid a wedding when a secret exposes a betrayal, and innocent friends converge with dangerous criminals and intense violence. Release Year: 2020 Director: Bejoy Nambiar Awards: 2021 WinnerPopular Award- Most Popular Supporting ActreSS in a Digital Film- Sanjeeda Sheikh, 2021 WinnerJury Award- Best Direction in a Digital Film- Bejoy Nambiar

programme.title: Do Lafzon Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Centered on ex-mixed martial arts artist Sooraj and sculptor artist Jenny. Their fate intertwines when their past are revealed in their relationship. Release Year: 2016 Director: Deepak Tijori

programme.title: Awarapan
programme.desc: Shivam, a hitman, is asked to keep an eye on his boss's mistress. However, he soon learns that she has been a victim of sex trafficking and decides to unite her with her lover. Release Year: 2007 Director: Mohit Suri

programme.title: Parmanu - The Story Of Pokhran
programme.desc: A look at India's second confidential nuclear test series at Pokhran led by Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam, during the time of PM Atal Bihari Vajpayee's tenure.

programme.title: Ek Villain Returns
programme.desc: When a singer disappears during a serial killer spree, a taxidriver and a businessman's son cross paths in a disturbing tale where the lines between good and evil are blurred.

programme.title: Namastey London
programme.desc: On a trip to India, Jasmeet's father forcefully marries her off to Arjun. However, when they return to London, Jasmeet announces her intention of marrying her boyfriend, Charlie Brown.

programme.title: TE3N
programme.desc: A man searches for clues related to the abduction and murder of his granddaughter, while a cop and a priest investigate a new kidnapping that bears similarities to that unsolved case.

programme.title: The Making Of Piku
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: Kantara
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: No Parking
programme.desc: Arun is an architect who falls in love with his co-worker. Things go haywire when he parks his bike in a "No Parking" zone. This takes him on a roller coaster ride full of lies and deceit.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Special- Befikre
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Saiyaara
programme.desc: Passionate lovers navigate a rollercoaster romance, facing euphoric highs and crushing lows while desperately clinging to their tumultuous bond.

programme.title: Dhool Ka Phool
programme.desc: Mahesh and Meena fall in love but he marries another girl at his father's behest. When Meena takes their baby to Mahesh, he rejects her saying their relationship was a mistake.

programme.title: Bahubali 2 The Conclusion
programme.desc: The story continues in this sequel as Bahubali's son Shiva (Prabhas), seeks revenge after learning about the reason behind his father's death

programme.title: Ghar Ki Laxmi
programme.desc: Chiranjeevi grows up in the company of his mom and aunts who dote on him. But he is ultimately frustrated at not finding a bride who would be approved by all of them.

programme.title: Pyare Mohan
programme.desc: Pyare and Mohan, two friends with visual and hearing disabilities respectively, fall in love with Preeti and Priya. When the women are charged with murder, the two try to save them.

programme.title: Srikanth
programme.desc: In a world where the odds are against him, Srikanth defies the norms and makes his way from rural India to becoming the first visually impaired student at MIT.

programme.title: Adbhut
programme.desc: Follows Diana who doesn't believe in supernatural power. But when she feels something strange happening on a regular basis, she reaches out to Nawaz for help.

programme.title: Double Xl
programme.desc: Two plus-size women who are body-shamed, head to London to prove that dreams matter and challenge the societal norms for beauty.

programme.title: Zara Hatke Zara Bachke
programme.desc: Kapil and Somya are a happily married couple who live in a joint family and decide to get a divorce. Things don't go as planned as their family gets to know of it, and thus begins a comedy of errors.

programme.title: The Making Of Pk
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Maaman
programme.desc: The emotional conflict between a maternal uncle and his nephew, delving into their strained relationship and the challenges that test their bond.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: 12th Fail
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Comedy Station - Producer Champaklal
programme.desc: Series of short, comedic vignettes where an unlucky Bhojpuri producer Champaklal and his secretary Suzie hilariously navigate chaotic, low-budget filmmaking, trying to outsmart each other

programme.title: Comedy Station - Dr Pran Lele
programme.desc: DR PRAN LELE, A quirky, mad-cap doctor - Dr. Pran Lele along with his crazy Nurse CPR is here to provide an abundant dose of LOLs & ROFLs as they treat their celebrity patients in their unique ways.

programme.title: Khandani Shafakhana
programme.desc: Babita Bedi working as a medical representative and the only earner in the house. She has to run a fertility clinic for six months in order to sell it or else she will lose everything.

programme.title: Patthar Ke Sanam
programme.desc: Rajesh works for Meena's father. Meena and her friend Taruna decide to play a prank on him. Both women pretend to fall in love with him, but he finds out, resulting in acrimony.

programme.title: Action
programme.desc: Subash, an Indian Army colonel, is sent to catch the mastermind behind a terror attack. However, the mission gets complicated when he discovers that the terrorists plan a political upheaval in India.

programme.title: Laalo-krishna Sada Sahaayate
programme.desc: A rickshaw driver trapped in a farmhouse confronts his past demons while experiencing visions of Lord Krishna, who guides him through a transformative journey of self-discovery and healing.

programme.title: Ludo
programme.desc: Four wildly different stories overlap at the whims of fate, chance and one eccentric criminal.

programme.title: Dhokha Round D Corner
programme.desc: A criminal breaks into a married couple's home and takes the wife hostage, igniting a tense standoff that surfaces secrets and lies.

programme.title: Heyy Baby
programme.desc: Three men living in Australia are surprised to find a baby on their doorstep. They do not know who the father is and start a frantic search for the woman who could possibly be the mother.

programme.title: Natpuna Ennanu Theriyuma
programme.desc: Three friends, Shiva, Raju, and Mani, run a successful wedding planning business and share a close bond. But when two of them fall for Shruti, their friendship begins to unravel.

programme.desc: Malar sees Parvathi as a sister, dreaming of a perfect life. Destiny shapes their journey what awaits them?

programme.title: Le Petit Piaf
programme.desc: In Reunion Island, Nelson, 10 years old, dreams of a career in music and applies to the show ''Star Kids''. Pierre Leroy, an artist whose career is faltering, happens to be on tour on the island. Nelson asks him for advice, but things do not go well with the disillusioned old singer.

programme.title: Rentrons
programme.desc: In a village in northern Algeria, Nouria and Abdel, a Frenchman who lives and works there, are friends. Following a bet, they set off on a moped trip along the Mediterranean coast. Their goal: to board a boat that will take them back to France.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 9
programme.desc: As each year, Grandpa wants to get all the family together to celebrate Haitian Flag Day, but Henri and Myrlande are submerged by their workload.

programme.title: Lakay Nou - EP 10
programme.desc: The restaurant is the victim of its own success, creating a feeling of dissatisfaction within the community. Henri is letting the pressure get to him and takes his stress out on his son.

programme.title: Natures Humaines - EP 1
programme.desc: Real welcomes the three couples for their first day at the chalet. After getting them to take part in a contest to choose their bedroom, Real explains the living rules on his land. Shocking revelations are not long in coming.

programme.title: Natures Humaines - EP 2
programme.desc: On the second day, Real's students must succeed in cooking an egg in a tin placed on the snow. Tensions mount and one of the participants wants to leave the adventure.

programme.title: Movie - Kombu Vecha Singamda

programme.title: Movie - Nepaali
programme.desc: Karthik's wife Priya is being harassed by a police officer and as a result she ends her life. But, Karthik is held responsible for her death and imprisoned. While in prison, a social worker offers to help him and clear his name.

programme.title: Movie - Raja Maharaja
programme.desc: Two brothers are at loggerheads because of their conflicting personalities; the older one is reliable, while the younger one is reckless. The conflict escalates after the younger brother accidentally kills the father of his brother's girlfriend.

programme.title: Movie - Ramaravanan
programme.desc: Thiruchelvam, a terrorist, falls in love with Manomi, a Sinhalese girl. She is aware that he belongs to a group which is engaged in war with the Sinhalese and it will be difficult for them to unite.

programme.title: Movie - Thee - Old
programme.desc: Raja and Ravi are two brothers who choose different career paths. While Raja becomes a smuggler, Ravi joins the police force and is ordered to hunt his brother down.

programme.title: Movie - Athiradi Vettai
programme.desc: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident was a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Poomagal Oorvalam

programme.title: Movie - Vedan

programme.title: Movie - Anegan

programme.title: Movie - Naalaya Theerpu
programme.desc: Arun, who has many extra-marital affairs, molests his wife, Mahalakshmi. However, things take an unexpected turn when she gets pregnant and has a son.

programme.title: Movie - Rasigar Mandram
programme.desc: Kathir and Pandian are rivals who run fan clubs for two different heroes, who take advantage of their animosity. Bharati decides to kill two birds with one stone by engaging the duo in a social cause.

programme.title: Movie - Irandu Mugam
programme.desc: Parthasarathy dreams of becoming a minister. With the help of a local leader, he becomes an MLA and also conducts a few shady deals. It is IAS officer Sarveswaran, his secretary, who has other plans.

programme.title: Moive - Sonnalthan Kaadhala

programme.title: Movie - Ezhaiyin Sirippil

programme.title: DP World Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Dutch Open is an annual golf tournament played in the Netherlands, and has been part of the European Tour's schedule since the Tour was inaugurated in 1972. Founded in 1912, the tournament began as the Dutch Open, before a variety of sponsors resulted in numerous name changes over the years. It is widely recognised as one of the best tournaments on the DP World Tour and is renowned for its relaxed atmosphere, as well as its activities for all ages.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: FS MMA Jake Shields vs. Ray Steinbeiss
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! In sunny Costa Rica, Jake Shields takes on Ray "Ipswich Cobra" Steinbeiss in a technical chess match that spells victory for only one man.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011. This fight saw one of the most controversial judges' deci

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned. The World Karate Federation expects a field of Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League makes its debut in Dubl

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Shane Mosley
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is then-unbeaten Saul "Canelo" Alvarez in what might yet be his toughest challenge in his career, as he defends the WBC light middleweight championship against "Sugar" Shane Mosley. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 2 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Asanoyama, Takakeisho, Kiribayama and Mitakeumi.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Weapons Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Marcos Maidana vs. Erik Morales
programme.desc: This episode features Marcos Maidana attempting to win the WBA interim super lightweight title against Erik Morales, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 71
programme.desc: Tinky Winky learns to play the didgeridoo. The Teletubbies do a special didgeridoo Tubby Phone Dance. Tiddlytubby Ping loves the didgeridoo too!

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 5
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'crab', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today we see different crabs that can walk sideways, hide, have big claws or are colourful. Dee makes friends with a crab by the seaside and even meets a king crab. The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Messy watches his sandcastle get washed away by the pouring rain. Why does it have to rain? He finds out why.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 42
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo need to move a crashed meteor. But every time Mojo goes near the big rock, moving turns to grooving. How can you move a meteor if you can't stop dancing?

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: Glitch wants to ski, so the Grimbots give Table Mountain a snowy peak, which threatens its rare plants.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 36
programme.desc: Mum and Dad are going on an adventure wearing the kids as their cheeky backpacks! Seeing the sights and buying street food, backpacking is a blast - until they lose their passports.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 39
programme.desc: Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad, standing on his feet as Dad stomps around the house, controlling everything Bingo does and causing chaos.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 30
programme.desc: When the photos Mr Hammond took of a family of Ethiopian wolves are mysteriously blank, it's up to Andy to save the day.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 11
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels stumble upon some of Duggee's old radio equipment and decide to start their own show.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on a mission to contain an outbreak when Roly inadvertently goes on the run with the world's smelliest cheese, earning their Cheese badges in the process.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Duggee helps the Squirrels learn about all the amazing things trees do for the creatures who live amongst them, and earn their tree badges in the process!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 22
programme.desc: When the Go Jetters find the Grimbots shipping overripe tomatoes into the Spanish town of Bunol, they put a stop to whatever Glitch is up to - until they find out that the tomatoes were destined for the famous Tomatina Festival, the biggest food fight in the world. Can the Go Jetters fix their own 'glitch' and save the festival?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 21
programme.desc: Alaska's a cool place to watch the salmon run, but Glitch opens a 'fishy taxi service' to help the salmon avoid tricky waterfalls and greedy bears. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 21
programme.desc: Sarah's hair keeps getting in her way, so it's time for a trip to the hairdressers.

programme.desc: Hattie calls up Stanley to help her make a cake. She doesn't have some of the ingredients. Stanley instead makes them using his ingenious contraptions.

programme.desc: The children want to make a big dinosaur model so they can learn all about it. They make such a huge dinosaur that they want to take it to the museum to be shown as an exhibit.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: Ubercorn is excited to see the Northern Lights, but Glitch's Grunge-Grimbler covers them with smoke.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 37
programme.desc: Princesses, horses and magic wands. Bluey and Chloe can play any role they want, when they embark on an adventure to save their playground kingdom from the Greedy Queen.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 40
programme.desc: When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand or enjoy, until they both realize they can play it their own way.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 31
programme.desc: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to the Pacific Ocean, off the coast of Mexico. His mission, to record a male humpback whale.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 12
programme.desc: Bella and Lift play with a stick that makes the perfect magic wand. They visit Patch, who has a tasty recipe - sticky stick critters!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 12
programme.desc: The Squirrels have fun learning what opposites are, with a little bit of help from a lot of topsy-turvy animal friends!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels stumble upon some of Duggee's old radio equipment and decide to start their own show.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on a mission to contain an outbreak when Roly inadvertently goes on the run with the world's smelliest cheese, earning their Cheese badges in the process.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 23
programme.desc: After a pod of pilot whales becomes stranded at the Academy beach, the Go Jetters, with help from new teacher Professor Wave, must work fast to return them to the ocean deeps. But with Glitch's camouflaged submarine zooming around the nearby waters, the situation quickly becomes more complicated.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 22
programme.desc: When the Go Jetters find the Grimbots shipping overripe tomatoes into the Spanish town of Bunol, they put a stop to whatever Glitch is up to - until they find out that the tomatoes were destined for the famous Tomatina Festival, the biggest food fight in the world. Can the Go Jetters fix their own 'glitch' and save the festival?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 13
programme.desc: Shane is having too much fun to stop and refuel. That is, until he runs out of coal and is stranded in the hot, red desert.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 22
programme.desc: After their snacks go missing, Sergeant Sarah and Constable Quack are on the trail of a biscuit burglar.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 23
programme.desc: Stumbling across an arcade, Sarah takes on a dancing challenge with John, whilst Duck and Flamingo team up to try and defeat a video game!

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Stan helps his friends to get a closer look at the moon through a telescope, so they can do a show-and-tell.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Hattie calls up Stanley to help her make a cake. She doesn't have some of the ingredients. Stanley instead makes them using his ingenious contraptions.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: From lions that love to climb to meerkats who play golf, the funny animals talk about all the brilliant stuff they love to do to keep active.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 1
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran get caught in the rain at the park and shelter under the bandstand. JoJo spots a rainbow and discovers that rainbows are only visible when it's rainy and sunny at the same time.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: The Squirrels are close to finishing a jigsaw puzzle when the Naughty Mice steal their last piece. To get it back, they must take part in a series of puzzles in an underground adventure set by the Puzzle Mouse.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Duggee struggles to organise the Squirrels in order of height and keeping them focused on the task. Sounds like the Squirrels need some training to improve their concentration.

programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 21

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 22

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Kelp and Scallop discover Mr. Pearly has a cave full of stuff they help him to realize it could help a lot of other sea creatures. / When the group goes camping, Kelp helps Ollie learn that even though it didn’t go exactly as planned, they can still have loads of fun.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop help Dad discover the true meaning of family trips. / When the Great Great Grandicorn comes to visit, the kids learn that making mistakes is part of learning.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Alex is mistaken for a Maine Coon and takes over that cat’s life in the penthouse. At first, VERY comfortable with his shmancy new life, Alex grows to miss his old life and learns that it’s lonely at the top.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 33

Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Having learnt where a hippos aggression comes from Steve wants to find out if we can live alongside the animal that kills up to 500 people a year. He visits St.Lucia, a town where hippos roam the streets freely at night, feeding on the manicured lawns and bushes of the townsfolk. In order to see them out of the water he must come back at night.

programme.title: Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles S02 - EP 1
programme.desc: Nick's journey begins in Prague, where he learns about the city's remarkable 600-year-old astronomical clock from its keeper.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores one of the darkest periods in Earth's history: the worst mass extinction the planet has ever seen, when as much as 90% of all species died 252 million years ago. This extraordinary moment in Earth's history took life to the brink, wreaking havoc and destruction on an unprecedented scale. But, somehow, life found a way to bounce back, and a new geological era ushered in the age of the dinosaurs.

programme.desc: Foodie sisters Jasmine and Melissa Hemsley showcase ingenious and highly nutritious recipes that will put a spring in your step when you need to power through the day. From their peppy and anti-inflammatory turmeric tea before a strenuous gym workout to sourcing grass fed meat for a protein rich onglet steak with kale salad for lunch, the girls create a nutrient dense menu that does you good while helping you power through a hectic day.

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Jamie makes a delicious soup using discounted veg that's on the turn, an easy cheesy soda bread, a money-saving DIY takeaway chicken burger, and old-school iced buns with low-cost dough.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: Monica and Giles travel into the snowy Alps to work behind the scenes in a hotel that offers six spa areas with the world's leading musicians playing for the guests in the evening.

programme.title: Grand Designs S22 - EP 4
programme.desc: In 1999, Julia Brock and Tim Cox became the first couple to feature on the show, building a family home on the cliffs in Newhaven, East Sussex. Kevin McCloud revisits the Newhaven self build.

programme.desc: It's the semi-final and the bakers make elegant, buttery patisserie and a puff pastry layered Italian celebration cake. Who will achieve complete and butter perfection to make it to the final?

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less - EP 2

programme.title: Million Dollar Buffet S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: The All You Eat Buffet is no longer about chicken chow mein and bad margarita pizza. It's a brave new world of $10,000 sides of wagyu beef, foie-gras mac n cheese, Alaska king crab claws piled to the ceiling and 20,000 gold leaf topped crème brûlées. This programme will visit the places where the luxury food is piled high.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show S33 - EP 14
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa tonight: freshly-knighted Sir Idris Elba, back for Season 2 of hostage thriller 'Hijack'; 'Hobbit' and 'Sherlock' star Martin Freeman, talking about Netflix series 'Agatha Christie's Seven Dials'; 'The Crown' and 'Adolescence' star Erin Doherty, discussing the new series of Victorian drama 'A Thousand Blows'. And triple-BRIT-nominated singer-songwriter Olivia Dean, performing So Easy (to Fall in Love) from her current album The Art of Loving.

programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6) - EP 85
programme.desc: Dolmar's got a steal of a deal in Port Richey. But after they pull up to this 90s Era Time capsule, they discover that vandals, roaches, and water damage have had their way with the interior.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays - EP 1
programme.desc: Gather around the table and prepare to give thanks! Rachael shows how to make a tender and crispy smoked turkey, seasoned with herbs and spices and served with chestnut and sausage stuffing.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers - EP 2
programme.desc: At the first stop, Ulaan Chuluut landfill, 'Trash Uncle' Kim Seok-hoon is back in action, diving into cleanup mode. But he finds something shocking that leaves him furious. What happened at the landfill?

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.title: Kidnapping In The Grand Canyon
programme.desc: When two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust an experienced hiking guide to bring them on an off-trail adventure, things go south when he takes them captive. They have to fight both man and nature.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3) - EP 13
programme.desc: Today's theme is "Hotel Stay vs. Countryside Stay: The Accommodation Showdown!" For those who are passionate about interior design, places encountered during travels can provide a wealth of inspiration.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17) - EP 19
programme.desc: It's the classic MasterChef team-relay challenge, where four teams must compete to create a dish that uses potatoes in at least two ways. The winning team will secure immunity from the next elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17) - EP 20
programme.desc: Twelve MasterChef contestants are met by a bust of judge Jean-Christophe Novelli, made entirely of butter. Fighting for their place in the competition, they must create a dish celebrating butter.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17) - EP 21
programme.desc: It's Viral Week and contestants must cook a dish worthy of a Nonna's table, under the watchful eyes of viral sensations Sooshi Mango. The four best dishes will win a shot at immunity.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Rachael demonstrates how easy it is to make flavourful Manila clams that can serve several people. She also cooks up a side dish of warm zucchini and corn salad with charred ciabatta bread.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 8
programme.desc: Your table is ready and it's time to get served in the most unusual ways. Join host Michael Yo's journey to Thailand for crispy flying fried chicken, then dinner is served with a side of sassy lip service.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6) - EP 80
programme.desc: Derek and Chauncey take on a house that was abandoned by previous flippers! Left with holes in the roof, termite damage and a dilapidated porch this house pushes their skills, and budget, to the limit.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece blends flavours from Latin and South America, adding her southern charm to create encocado shrimp with poblano-stuffed grits, also known as Latin shrimp and grits.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: Today, we'll explore a house where, if the perfect wooden furniture isn't available, the couple takes matters into their own hands, creating their own pieces, making it feel like a cozy cafe.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 8
programme.desc: James decides to join up with a former flip partner to attack a zombie house in the form of a 1940s brick bungalow. The deal is overshadowed by the "ghost flip", a flip gone bad from the past with Brian.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: Allie is a free spirit whose polyamorous lifestyle is ruined by the gumball-sized bump above her eye. Andrew's psoriasis and multiple body bumps have held him back from starting a family with his wife.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13) - EP 17
programme.desc: With Gordon Ramsay's reputation on the line, the top six chefs face the ultimate challenge of taking over the world's largest Hell's Kitchen restaurant.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1) - EP 19
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up some serious comfort food. With this much flavour, you'd never guess that these robust bull's-eye burgers, topped with sauteed onions and blue-cheese sauce, are actually plant-based.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: Rachael teaches us how to make a family-favourite recipe of pork cutlets with a fruity and savoury huckleberry sauce, served with potato salad, broccolini and fresh cherry tomatoes.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6) - EP 86
programme.desc: In an ideal neighborhood, a ramshackle bungalow with some vandalism and a faulty foundation falls in Derek and Chauncey's laps. A friend of theirs needs help with a flip and only has two weeks.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays - EP 2
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make an impressive holiday meal that will make your guests feel like VIPs with her recipe for roasted garlic and rosemary prime rib, which she serves with her mother's special sauce.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers - EP 3
programme.desc: The Earth-Cleaning Bros' second mission: planting trees in the Elsen Tasarkhai desert! Led by self-proclaimed Mongolian expert Shaun, they set out with just one GPS coordinate.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.

programme.title: My Father's Murder In Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George soon ends up murdered. Now Allie must uncover long-kept family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3) - EP 14
programme.desc: Today, we'll introduce you to popular "no-interior" homes. We'll showcase the "Self-Made 3 No House," where unnecessary elements are completely removed, and the "Hide-and-Seek House".

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17) - EP 22
programme.desc: Contestants face a pressure test for Immunity designed by Dessert Masters winner John Demetrios. As a famous dessert chef, it stands to reason that today's cook will be a sweet mountain to climb.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17) - EP 23
programme.desc: It's viral week and contestants are vying for immunity once again, challenged to create the ultimate 'scrollable' deli meats sandwich followed by a viral dish mash-up.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17) - EP 24
programme.desc: Hey, Babe! With over 13 million social media followers and three billion views on YouTube, online superstar and chef of over 20 years' experience Andy Cooks (aka chef Andy Hearnden) sets two challenges.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Rachael teaches us how to make an Israeli-inspired, tahini-based yoghurt sauce with harissa, served over charred chicken and family-style pitta.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 9
programme.desc: Tune is as host Michael Yo takes us to places set to satisfy the palate, while also challenging our ideas of a dining experience. Our first stop is a sushi-bar and game-show joint in New York City.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6) - EP 81
programme.desc: Derek sees big profit potential when he buys a crumbling old house in a nice neighborhood. Chauncey is skeptical of the half-finished work and the small square footage. Was this all a big mistake?

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece prepares a pasta version of paella, a traditional Spanish dish, and gives it a Southern mac-and-cheese twist.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: When we watch comedians on television, they often seem approachable and friendly. But have you ever wondered what their homes look like and how they're decorated? Today's theme is "Comedians' Homes."

programme.title: The Boy Who Vanished
programme.desc: When her long-lost son returns a decade after his abduction, a mother's joy quickly turns to suspicion as he exhibits increasingly strange behaviour. What is he hiding? And is he even actually her son?

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 9
programme.desc: House-flipping titan James takes on his toughest challenge yet. When his team finds a hoarder's nightmare with rotting walls, a sketchy layout and a collapsing roof, James is excited by the challenge.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s “The Exchange” is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 97
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1
programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.desc: Experts give advice to the questions and troubles from viewers about child-rearing.

programme.title: Gretel's Magical Oven
programme.desc: Each week, a particular sweet and its recipe will be introduced along with various topics about the sweet.

programme.title: Japanese Narrative Art
programme.desc: A program introducing Japanese comic narratives performed by well-known comic storytellers.

programme.title: French in a Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let’s learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for “happiness” and various forms of “joy” through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: Real-Life Travel English
programme.desc: This program is a practical listening course designed to help you understand fast-paced real English that you encounter when traveling abroad.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: Kid's Discovery (R)
programme.desc: In this program, children around the age of 4 can experience the pleasure of playing with friends, the wonder of life, the joy of doing thigs by themselves, and consideration for others, all while having fun through various discoveries.

programme.title: With Mother (R)
programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.title: See, Learn, Explore--A Deep Travelogue in Tohoku
programme.desc: Explore the unknown charms of the Tohoku region of northern Japan.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 61 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. programme.desc: Every summer, several typhoons approach Japan and make landfall. By understanding the way they move and the power of their rainstorms, we can learn how to protect ourselves and our possessions.

programme.title: Herbal Symphony
programme.desc: Discover Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden in Uda - here the natural landscape from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule as a sanctuary of local culture and history.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life

programme.title: Ethical Every Day

programme.desc: Invite stylish men from all over the world to share cultural differences, feelings and values, and life experiences with Taiwanese!

programme.title: Hello Doctor - EP 1775
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play! - EP 61
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 520
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: No.57 Dream Boulevard - EP 1991
programme.desc: More professional, richer, and more diversified car model information is shared with the audience.

programme.title: Have Fun Together - EP 105
programme.desc: A star-studded, cross-generational travel reality show that documents the unforgettable friendship journey of artists from different generations!

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 103
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. programme.title: Time Concert 2024 - EP 3
