programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 13
programme.desc: Ching-lam's relentless pursuit of answers strains his relationships with those closest to him. As Kong Ka-ching worries he is losing himself to obsession, Ying-fung encourages him to focus on the future rather than the past.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 5

programme.title: Ride The Wind 2026 - EP 3
programme.desc: On the wings of the wind, the sisters soar, chasing dreams with courage, growing with every step on stage. In Ride the Wind 2026, women from all walks of life unite, breaking boundaries through performance after performance, blooming into their most radiant selves.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 26
programme.desc: Li Li finally makes peace with a long-standing regret and discovers that happiness does not always come from following the path others expect. Inspired by her courage, Ji Xing begins reflecting on whether she should be equally honest about her own feelings.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 5

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: “Made In Taiwan” records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the “Made In Taiwan” theme content. Expecting the viewing of the movie for nearly an hour is a rhythm and fresh, like a cloud and flowing water, which makes the viewers moved and harvests a rich intellectual journey.

programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. programme.desc: The invincible lawyer Pak-Yin believes his proficiency in legal knowledge enables him to have it all, including a loving life with his wife Po-Lam. His world collapses when infidelity occurs due to the differences between them.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2834
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational valu

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 18
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 14
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy.

programme.title: Communion - EP 2
programme.desc: After getting divorced, Au Yiu-cho (Kwok Chun On) and Tang Lai-kuen (Alice Chan) operate two restaurants coincidentally called Yuet Tak House in Hong Kong and on the mainland respectively. They never have issues with each other. In 2022, Lai-kuen abruptly returns to Hong Kong to open a branch. She even declares she wants to obtain the rights to the Yuet Tak House trademark through legal channels.

programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 7
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 35
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 36
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 14
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy.

programme.title: Communion - EP 2
programme.desc: After getting divorced, Au Yiu-cho (Kwok Chun On) and Tang Lai-kuen (Alice Chan) operate two restaurants coincidentally called Yuet Tak House in Hong Kong and on the mainland respectively. They never have issues with each other. In 2022, Lai-kuen abruptly returns to Hong Kong to open a branch. She even declares she wants to obtain the rights to the Yuet Tak House trademark through legal channels.

programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 7
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 35
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 36
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 9
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 39
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Provocateur - EP 1
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him.

programme.title: Oily Maniac
programme.desc: Famous director Ho Meng-hua, who gave Jackie Chan and Sammo Hung acting breaks in his early kung-fu films, broke new ground with his horror hit Oily Maniac. Based on a true story about a creature that kills people at night and covers them in oil, it stars young actor Danny Lee (aka. Li Hsiu-hsien) as the oily maniac. It was considered so scary that it was censored drastically.

programme.title: Prince Charming
programme.desc: Chen Li Pin, the nerdy son of a business tycoon, and his friend seek love in Hawaii. Returning home in disappointment, they accidentally find themselves in a messy identity swap. It is at this time that Chen falls for a beautiful girl May, who thinks he is a company chauffeur...

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm's VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears...

programme.title: A Man Called Hero
programme.desc: In 1913, a brutal massacre forces Hua into exile in America. Reunited with his pregnant wife, tragedy strikes again when their home burns down on the night she gives birth to twins, killing her while their daughter gets kidnapped. Sixteen years later, as his son finds him, Hua confronts his ultimate nemesis in a climactic duel on top of the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: King Kong comes to Hong Kong in THE MIGTHY PEKING MAN, a uniquely Shaw Brothers spin on the ageless theme of beauty and the beast. The beast, seven stories high and hailing from the Himalayas, makes his way to the jungles of India in the wake of a violent earthquake. The beauty is Russia starlet Evelyne Kraft, a sexy blonde Tarzanette who is the Mighty Peking Man's best friend.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: After the Sino-Japanese war, Wing Chun grandmaster Ip Man and his family experience hardship in their hometown and eventually moved to Hong Kong for a new life. He wants to open a martial arts school in Hong Kong, but first he must pass and win the challenges put forth by the local martial arts grandmasters.

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays an arrogant god in Heaven who is being punished for his pranks and mistakes. He is sent to Earth and reincarnate as Mad Monk to change the destiny of three misguided souls - a prostitute, a beggar and a villain. The Mad Monk needs to complete the task in three days in order to return to Heaven.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Directed by the acclaimed filmmaker Wong Kar Wai, this epic action feature begins in Foshan when Ip Man, the martial arts master from the south, takes up a challenge by ageing northern master Gong Yu Tian. Ip Man wins the fight, but is then defeated by Gong Yu Tian's daughter Gong Er, with whom he forms an emotional bond...

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey2-Cinderella
programme.desc: Following the chaos unleashed by Pandora's Box, Joker is thrust through time and begins to awaken as the Monkey King, Sun Wukong. Torn between mortal emotions and divine destiny, he struggles to reconcile his love for Zixia Fairy with the responsibilities of his past.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: Destiny's Champion
programme.desc: An aging fighter relives the mistakes of his violent past through a poor and streetwise kid, who severely injures his nemesis during a battle to win a girl's heart.

programme.title: From Beijing With Love
programme.desc: A reactivated backup Chinese agent, posing as a butcher, is unexpectedly assigned to recover a stolen dinosaur skull. Sent to Hong Kong, he is aided by a female agent who is secretly working for the villains. Together, they navigate betrayals and confront the mastermind, ultimately recovering the national treasure and exposing the conspiracy.

programme.title: Iceman the Time Traveller
programme.desc: In this sequel, the four imperial guards are defrosted and reanimated in modern Hong Kong. Driven by a single goal to obtain the Golden Wheel of Time and right the wrongs of the past, Ying embarks on a perilous quest, unaware that every step draws him deeper into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Cop Shop Babes
programme.desc: Island East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its "Cop Shop Babes" as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat - can they resolve the case?

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Hong Kong action cinema is famous for its real kung fu moves performed by a group called "Kung Fu Stuntmen". This docu-film pays tribute to the generations of kung fu stuntmen, with the crew spending over two years digging archives and interviewing many talents, including the most prominent masters like Jackie Chan, Donnie Yen and Sammo Hung.

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang's custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: She is in Danger
programme.desc: After a fight with her boyfriend, Xue leaves home to stay in a remote B&B accommodation, together with a roommate Yi. One night, Xue accidentally discovers that Yi and another friend have killed Yi's ex-boyfriend, and is locked up by the duo so as to cover up the murder. Xue's buddy, Wen, comes seeking for her - can Xue and Wen escape from danger?

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then...

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter -the sole witness- mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Military veteran Wu and undercover cop Ming rescue hostages on an island near Bangkok. Just as the mission is completed and they prepare to leave, Wu discovers his daughter has also been captured. Determined to save her, he stays with Ming to fight the thugs and rescue her.

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: A heroic tale about Hong Kong's brave firefighters. These courageous men can march into disastrous firegrounds and risk their lives to save others. However, do they have the same courage to confront their personal issues?

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Falsely accused of murder, Ming Dynasty Imperial Guard Ying is pursued by his three sworn brothers until a fierce battle leaves all four entombed in ice. Four hundred years later, they awaken in modern Hong Kong, where they must reignite their ancient feud in a world they can barely recognise.

programme.title: Mr. Possessed
programme.desc: Riley is cursed by an evil spirit to not be able to approach any woman. When he falls in love with Siu Yu, Riley's mother decides to use her to help him vanquish the evil spirit. On their wedding night, Riley passes out after protecting Siu Yu from the attack of the evil spirit. Can the two finally break the curse?

programme.title: God of Gamblers 2
programme.desc: After the God of Gamblers Ko Chun disappears, his disciple Little Knife rises in the gambling world. His fame attracts a ruthless rival who seeks to defeat him. Facing high-stakes games, Little Knife must rely on his skills to overcome his enemies and defend the honour of the God of Gamblers.

programme.title: Teenage Dreamers
programme.desc: Ting Ting is a student in an all-girl high school. She tries out for the school's stage production of Romeo and Juliet with an all-boy school and promptly falls for the lead, Jackson. While Ting Ting is swept away by the excitement of her first love, Jackson turns out to be more of a player than a partner.

programme.title: Mother VS Mother
programme.desc: Guan De Xing fell in love with Li Xiao Yun when he was young, but was opposed by his mother and had to marry Zhou Shen Yu. Since then, Li holds a grudge against Zhou. Unfortunately, the son of Guan and Zhou falls in love with Li's daughter, and as the two mothers meet, they start brawling again!

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Undercover cop Lang is assigned to befriend former triad boss Fei in order to investigate a diamond heist masterminded by the ruthless gangster Big Mad. When the deal goes awry and the diamonds end up in Fei's possession, Big Mad comes after them with a vengeance, forcing Lang and Fei to join forces as an unlikely bond begins to form between them.

programme.title: Sixty Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Sing is a rich man studying abroad, but is so spoiled that he can never concentrate on his studies but spends his time flirting with girls. One day, Sing gets blown up by a mobster when he hooks up with his mistress, Silvia. This arrogant prankster is resurrected instead as an unbeatable cyborg with unique skills, a real job and a new true love.

programme.title: Seeding Of A Ghost
programme.desc: It's an erotic gore-fest starring Kao Fei who seeks vengeance against his wife's rapists and killers by soliciting the help of a demented magician. In return, he endures copulating dead bodies as his enemies perish in blood spurting and body exploding glory. It's one of Hong Kong goriest films ever made.

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud's successor as the city's guard.

programme.title: The Black Tavern
programme.desc: This sword-filled thriller centres on The Black Tavern - an inn where the down and dirty meet to plot nefarious doings. A bunch of villains are lured to the inn by a rumour about a valuable treasure being hidden there. After all the backstabbing and killings, they realise that it is a trap created to wipe them out once and for all…

programme.title: Dead End
programme.desc: Uninhibited youth Chun meets a rich girl Wen when her car breaks down and drives her home. Chun falls in love with Wen but Wen's brother dislikes him and forbids his sister to see him. He humiliates Chun and gets Chun beaten up, so Chun takes the pistol he has found accidentally on the street to Wen's home and shoots her brother dead.

programme.title: The Lady Professional
programme.desc: Lily Ho is perfectly cast as a gun-for-hire who always gets her man - in more ways than one! The cast and crew shot on location in Japanese scenic spots such as Mount Fuji; and there are plenty of over-the-top thrills, as Lily even masquerades as a nun.

programme.title: The Deadly Breaking Sword
programme.desc: Warrior Tuan Chang Qing meets courtesan Liu Yin Xi in a small town. Liu pleads Tuan to kill the underworld master Guo Tian Sheng, known as the "Killer Doctor", in order to avenge the death of her fiance. Tuan and gambling addict Xiao Dao breaks into Guo's household, triggering the battle of good against evil.

programme.title: Iron Bodyguard
programme.desc: Wang Wu, the head of a security firm Iron Bodyguard, meets a scholar who is a member of the Reformists, a group of scholars pressing for social reform in China at the end of the Qing dynasty. The Emperor actually supports such reforms but not the Empress Dowager. She orders the Reformists to be arrested and Wang Wu gets drawn into the politics.

programme.title: The Pure and the Evil
programme.desc: Two teen girls, Rose and May, become close friends despite their different social backgrounds. The rich girl May moves to America but returns years later to see Rose, now a beauty queen and bar girl. Rose is immediately attracted to Fang's fiancé and their relationship quickly deteriorates when Rose sets out to pursue him…

programme.title: Pursuit of a Killer
programme.desc: The charm of Pursuit Of A Killer lies in the long awaited reunion of Five Venoms duo, Lo Meng and Sun Chien; Lo Meng, who plays a Mainland Chinese criminal escapee to Hong Kong in search of a better life, and a cop (Sun Chien) who helps him adjust to Hong Kong life while tracking down his mysterious killer at the same time.

programme.title: Sons Of Good Earth
programme.desc: This is an epic tale set during the time of the Sino-Japanese war. A painter Yu saves a young girl, Lotus, who is being sold to a brothel. They fall in love, get married and settled in to a peaceful life. However, their life is soon shattered by the Japanese invasion and the brutal regime that follows...

programme.title: Swordsman at Large
programme.desc: Hsiao Shi Yi Lang is the Swordsman at large who everyone wants to kill. A magnificient sword is even created for this purpose though the blade is soon coveted more than the swordsman's death by it! Bandits, beauties and blade masters battle for survival in this exciting story of deceit, betrayal, and death.

programme.title: Forever And Ever
programme.desc: Ivy Ling Po plays a young scholar who is manipulated into marrying a nobleman's reluctant daughter. After marrying, he soon discovers the reason for her hesitation. She is stricken with a contagious disease. But, with the power of true love, their romance prevails.

programme.title: The Fighting Fool
programme.desc: Famous Kung Fu Pole master Red Eagle, is kidnapped by a villain one day. His disciple Meng, vows to rescue him. On his way, Meng encounters a greedy but great martial artist who agrees to join him in the rescue. Even though the two have extremely different personalities, they manage to team up and fight the villain in a final showdown.

programme.title: Blue Skies
programme.desc: A young singer Hsiao Yun becomes an overnight sensation after standing in for another singer at the eleventh hour. Her success comes at a heavy price however, when her love with a pianist suffers. On top of this, Hsiao Yun must also deal with the unwanted affections from an influential backer of her show.

programme.title: The Casino
programme.desc: After being separated for many years, two childhood lovers meet in a possibly mythical "Lucky Casino" and vow to rid the establishment of the corrupt military generals, criminals and extortionists!

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: The movie consists of four stories of the Mad Monk helping others, from saving a mother and daughter from crumbling walls, to helping hawkers deal with bullies, recovering stolen money for a young man and punishing a devious court official and his son.

programme.title: The Killer Has No Return
programme.desc: Professional killer Lui goes to Malaysia after completing his mission of killing the big boss of a Hong Kong gang. His next target is a groom who is throwing his wedding banquet at a hotel in Chinatown. Just when Lui takes aim at his target, another victim instead of the groom is shot, and he becomes a scapegoat in this mystery assassination.

programme.title: The Dream of the Red Chamber
programme.desc: Adapted from the most widely read and filmed novel in Chinese history, this version is said to be the most successful one. Betty Loh's looks, demeanour and aura in her portrayal of Lin Dai Yu has won her the epithet "Classic Beauty".

programme.title: Buddha's Palm
programme.desc: Young Long Jian Fei, a martial arts novice, is adopted by the Fire Spirit Demon who taught him the powerful Buddha's Palm, turning Long into a martial arts master. Long is tasked by the Fire Spirit Demon to takes revenge for his master, and this soon unleashes a storm upon the martial arts world…

programme.title: The Love Eterne
programme.desc: Ying Tai disguises herself as a boy to go to school and falls hopelessly in love with her classmate, Shan Bo. After Shan Bo realizes her true identity, he proposes marriage to Ying Tai. However, they are kept apart as she is engaged to another man. Knowing Shan Bo died in despair, Ying Tai is in deep sorrow and kills herself at his grave.

programme.title: Heroes Of Sung
programme.desc: Heroes Of Sung stars one of the original kung fu ladies of the silver screen, Shih Szu, who plays swordswoman Meng Hung. She must work with Fan Tien-Fu, played by Lo Lieh to find and protect the royal seals of the Sung Dynasty. Shih's magnificent performance earned her the female hero role in another hit Dracula And The 7 Golden Vampires.

programme.title: The Tigress Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Sam is being hunted as he discovers that the mayor and the chief of medical bureau are colluding with a drug dealer. He is saved by a fishermen family and works in their friend's grocery but the grocery owner is killed when the enemies track Sam down. Sam escapes to Shaolin to learn the cudgel style of kung fu in order to avenge his friends.

programme.title: Sweet And Wild
programme.desc: Fang is a spunky young village girl who is not afraid to fight back against hooligans. She gets into trouble with the biggest hoodlum Tong when she foils his plans with a maid, causing Tong to plot a revenge. Luckily a man whom she is attracted to, Hai, comes in time to her rescue. Can they fight back?

programme.title: The Jade Faced Assassin
programme.desc: Two forbidden lovers, Zhang Zhen and Yue Nu, are killed by four villains and left behind their twin babies. Yue Nu's elder sister hopes to restore the clan's honour and separates the twins, arranging for them to be raised by competing clans. 18 years later, the twins meet and fight against each other, bringing chaos to the martial arts world.

programme.title: The Magnificent Concubine
programme.desc: Yang Gui Fei is the beloved concubine of Emperor Tang Ming Huang, who is so besotted with her that he leaves the running of the country to Prime Minister Yang Guo Zhong, the brother of Yang Gui Fei. The Prime Minister is corrupt and cruel to the army, causing them to revolt and endanger the throne. Yang Gui Fei is also implicated and kills herself.

programme.title: The Eunuch
programme.desc: A year before Lo Wei directed Bruce Lee in Fist Of Fury, he wrote and co-starred in this tale of a treacherous devil who wants nothing less than supreme power...and doesn't care if he has to murder the Emperor and use his own daughter as a deadly dupe to get it.

programme.title: Tiger Killer
programme.desc: Wu Song is appointed as chief constable after killing a tiger with his bare hands when drunk. The wife of his brother Wu Da Lang, seduces Wu Song but gets rejected by him, and engages in an affair with a rich man. They poison Wu Da Lang when he finds out about their affair. To avenge his brother's death, Wu Song kills both of them.

programme.title: Na Cha And The Seven Devils
programme.desc: While stealing one magical peach from a mystic tree in Heaven, Little Na Cha accidentally drops seven others on Earth, which transformed seven different animals into seven devils. Na Cha must hunt the devils down in ten days or his father will be punished by the King of Heaven. Can Na Cha complete his mission?

programme.title: Rear Entrance
programme.desc: Mrs Xu is childless and watches a lonely little girl playing at the rear entrance from afar every day. She warmly nurtures the girl and even adopts her from her uncaring parent. The girl brings happiness to the Xu's until her long lost mother appears one day and to make her happy, Mrs Xu reluctantly lets the girl reunite with her mother.

programme.title: Oath Of Death
programme.desc: Three Sung loyalists become blood brothers to fight the tyranny of the Tartar invaders. To oust the oppressors altogether, Ma releases the kidnapped Tartar princess in a strategic effort to gain points with the invaders, but it soon becomes apparent that he desires both a great position and power, and will do anything to get it…

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: Teenage heart-throbs Ching Li and Paul Chin Pei come across like Annette Funicello and Frankie Avalon in the musical Sunset, a musical romp that plays similar to one of Hollywood's famous "Beach Party" movies. A car load of girls meets a car load of boys, and Ching and Paul ultimately fall in love. Yet the film takes an acrid twist and turns out to be more like a Shakespearian tragedy than a beach-babe party.

programme.title: Shao Kang's War Room
programme.desc: Shao Kang's War Room is a Talkshow hosted by Zhao Shao Kang. This programme combines TVBS News source and Mr. Zhao's rich political and media background, to analyse important news deeply.

programme.title: Global Golden Line
programme.desc: It is the first professional reality car show, providing concrete evaluations of cars on the market, the deepest appreciation for classic cars, the hottest trends in the motoring world, and analysis of the latest auto tech trends.

programme.title: Hello, Saturday - EP 107
programme.desc: Helmed by the ever-popular veteran show host He Jiong, this all-new variety show features celebrity artistes from China, Hong Kong and Taiwan participating in song and dance performances, games and more.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 24
programme.desc: Shao Yichen unexpectedly reconnects with an old acquaintance who encourages him to stop dwelling on the past. Watching Ji Xing gradually move closer to Han Ting, he finally begins letting go of feelings he has carried for years and starts embracing a different future.

programme.title: Viva La Romance Season 6 - EP 8
programme.desc: A reality show that delves into couples' conversations, centered on love and understanding. Four couples travel and glean insights from other couples' dynamics, fostering self-reflection, empathy, and marital rejuvenation.

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 17
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 11
programme.desc: As Hoi Ching-lam edges closer to the truth, he uncovers unexpected links between his brother's past and Shek Ngo-shan's career. While suspicion deepens, Yip Ying-fung warns him that not every answer will bring closure.

programme.desc: Li Li finally makes peace with a long-standing regret and discovers that happiness does not always come from following the path others expect. Inspired by her courage, Ji Xing begins reflecting on whether she should be equally honest about her own feelings.
